## ASML fair-value analysis flags valuation uncertainty ahead of upcoming earnings

ASML earnings are the most important bellwether for the EUV/EUVL cycle and leading-edge litho demand — valuation uncertainty ahead of the print means the risk/reward setup is unresolved; watch for order book and booking guidance as the key data points.

- SimplyWall.st is running a pre-earnings fair-value assessment for ASML
- Whether ASML is fairly valued is the open question framed in coverage
- Litho roadmap progress and the broader semiconductor cycle are implicit backdrops
- No specific earnings estimate, target price, or valuation figure is cited in the headline
